To symbolicate these frames, I need to:
1. Find the debug symbols for `libcoreclr.so` with that specific BuildId

I'll try fetching from these URL patterns to locate the symbols.

arguments.command:
mkdir -p /tmp/nuget-extract
cd /tmp/nuget-extract

# Download a few .NET 10 Android arm64 runtime packages and check BuildId
# Tombstone is from Feb 2026, so likely .NET 10.0.x
for VER in "10.0.3" "10.0.4" "10.0.5" "10.0.2" "10.0.1" "10.0.0"; do
  echo "=== Checking version $VER ==="
  URL="https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64/${VER}/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64.${VER}.nupkg"
  curl -sSL "$URL" -o pkg.zip 2>/dev/null
  
  # Extract just the libcoreclr.so and check its BuildId
  unzip -o -q pkg.zip "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" 2>/dev/null
  if [ -f "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" ]; then
    FOUND_ID=$(readelf -n runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so 2>/dev/null | grep "Build ID" | awk '{print $NF}')
    echo "  BuildId: $FOUND_ID"
    if [ "$FOUND_ID" = "4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801" ]; then
      echo "  *** MATCH FOUND! Version: $VER ***"
      break
    fi
    rm -f runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so
  else
    echo "  No libcoreclr.so in package"
  fi
  rm -f pkg.zip
done

echo "=== Trying to get debug symbols for 10.0.3 BuildId ==="
for fname in "libcoreclr.so.dbg" "_.debug" "libcoreclr.so.dwarf" "libcoreclr.dbg"; do
  for key in "elf-buildid-sym-${MATCH_BUILDID}" "elf-buildid-${MATCH_BUILDID}"; do
    URL="$SYMSERVER/$fname/$key/$fname"
    CODE=$(curl -sSL -o "/tmp/nuget-extract/${fname}" -w "%{http_code}" "$URL" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then
      echo "HIT ($CODE): $URL"
      file "/tmp/nuget-extract/${fname}"
    fi
  done
done

echo ""
echo "=== Also try downloading symbols NuGet package ==="
# Runtime symbols packages
SYMBOLS_URL="https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64/${VER}/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64.${VER}.snupkg"
CODE=$(curl -sSL -o /tmp/nuget-extract/symbols.snupkg -w "%{http_code}" "$SYMBOLS_URL" 2>/dev/null)
echo "Symbols NuGet (.snupkg) HTTP status: $CODE"

# Try runtime symbols package 
for PKG in "runtime.android-arm64.microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.coreclr" "runtime.android-arm64.microsoft.netcore.app" "microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.symbols.android-arm64"; do
  URL="https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/${PKG}/index.json"
  CODE=$(curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$URL" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then
    echo "Found package: $PKG"
    curl -sS "$URL" | python3 -c "import json,sys; [print(v) for v in json.load(sys.stdin).get('versions',[])]" 2>/dev/null | tail -5
  fi
done

arguments.command:
cd /tmp/nuget-extract
TARGET_BUILDID="4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"

# Check the .NET 10 preview versions we haven't checked yet
for VER in "10.0.0-preview.1.25080.5" "10.0.0-preview.2.25163.2" "10.0.0-preview.3.25171.5" "10.0.0-preview.4.25258.110" "10.0.0-preview.5.25277.114" "10.0.0-preview.6.25358.103" "10.0.0-preview.7.25380.108"; do
  URL="https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64/${VER}/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64.${VER}.nupkg"
  curl -sSL "$URL" -o pkg.zip 2>/dev/null
  unzip -o -q pkg.zip "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" 2>/dev/null
  if [ -f "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" ]; then
    FOUND_ID=$(readelf -n runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so 2>/dev/null | grep "Build ID" | awk '{print $NF}')
    if [ "$FOUND_ID" = "$TARGET_BUILDID" ]; then
      echo "*** MATCH: $VER (BuildId: $FOUND_ID) ***"
    else
      echo "$VER: $FOUND_ID"
    fi
    rm -f runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so
  else
    echo "$VER: no libcoreclr.so"
  fi
  rm -f pkg.zip
done
arguments.description: Check preview versions for matching BuildId
